title: Lebanon braces for Pentagon talks over Hezbollah disarmament — May 29 military coordination meeting ahead of June 2-3 4th round Washington talks
snippet: Lebanese and Israeli military officers expected at Pentagon May 29 for first military-to-military coordination meeting. Focus: Hezbollah arsenal, Israeli withdrawal from south Lebanon, Lebanese Army deployment. Joint operations room under US supervision proposed. Ahead of June 2-3 4th round Washington political talks. 45-day ceasefire extension from April 16.
tag_reason: 5/29 펜타곤 군사 조정 회의는 이전 보고서에 없는 신규 외교 일정.
